tagline: Developer code intelligence at a glance
prompt: Developer code intelligence platform. Inspired by darkmodedesign.com: 108 Supply bento editorial grid on dark background, Cecilia bold white type on near-black sculptural space, Linear-style dark navy with vivid violet accent and data-forward minimal chrome. Also lapa.ninja: Mobbin utility-forward dark UI with strong typographic hierarchy. Dark theme: space-black #080B14, electric violet #7C5CFC, teal success #06D6A0, amber warning, monospace readouts for metrics. Bento-box data grid meets Linear SaaS confidence.
